nasb.text: Then David said, “Is there yet anyone left of the house of Saul, that I may show him kindness for Jonathan’s sake?”

esv.text: And David said, “Is there still anyone left of the house of Saul, that I may show him kindness for Jonathan’s sake?”

cnv.text: 大衛問：“掃羅家還有剩下的人沒有？我要因約拿單的緣故，以慈愛待他。”

ccb.text: 大卫问：“扫罗一家还有什么人吗？我要因为和约拿单的情义而恩待他。”
